what_is_established: In one dataset of 27 cases, monotonic relationship between confidence and correctness observed under one thresholding scheme
what_is_NOT_established: Signal driven by few dominant cases vs distributed
Signal not artifact of class imbalance
risk_flags: P(correct|low)=0.0% in n=27 is statistically suspicious (sparse/low bucket)
next_steps: Re-run delta experiment with full trace capture (per-case logging)
Measure calibration error as mandatory post-processing
Only proceed to Phase 2 after all three metrics pass
philosophical_correction: We have a promising but non-identifiable correlation artifact with missing observational structure. Not a validated signal.
